codeReview.summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, skill guidance, and commit b0e5fba. The implementation now routes bootstrap refresh through shared runtime state, keeps degraded seeded-bootstrap /coins/markets rows compatible by nulling market-value fields, and aligns runtime diagnostics with the selected degraded-boot policy covered by targeted stale-data regressions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission shared state does not explain the repo README transition even though workers are required to start exploration from README.md. A previous worker hit ENOENT on /home/whoami/dev/openGecko/README.md, while the file exists in the current environment, so future workers may repeat that confusion without a note in shared state.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker transcript skeleton for session 80d04f19-aa6c-45c5-82dd-07e07790d605 shows early README-first exploration and related project context reads; an earlier sibling session in the same mission hit ENOENT for /home/whoami/dev/openGecko/README.md, while the current repo root now contains README.md and neither mission AGENTS.md nor .factory/library mention that movement.

summary: Pass. The reviewed change set makes /simple/price, /coins/markets, and /diagnostics/runtime agree on degraded serving semantics for residual bootstrap snapshots, and I found no blocking or non-blocking code issues in scope.
